steps.detail: Spawned backend agent (haiku/high) for tasks: b9fa1d9eb639

task_snapshots.title: 333d-02: Fair spawn distribution algorithm
task_snapshots.description:
Implement proportional spawn allocation in orchestrator._tick(). Each tick:
1. Count open tasks per role: {backend: 5, qa: 3, docs: 2}
2. Count active agents per role: {backend: 2, qa: 0, docs: 0}
3. Calculate max agents per role = ceil(max_agents * role_tasks / total_tasks)
4. Spawn agents for starving roles first (qa before backend gets 3rd)

[subtask of 15d83a329576]

**Completion signal**: Orchestrator spawns agents proportionally; test shows qa gets 1 agent before backend gets 3rd.
